case_title: CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. SOPHIA SESMA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-01-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SF TAX COLLECTOR'S REPRESENTATIVE ROSEBEL SINGH. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO HEARING BEFORE JPT. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,179.40 FILED BY CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT SESMA, SOPHIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SESMA, SOPHIA $4,179.40 PRINCIPAL, $130.97 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,310.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO FEBRUARY 1, 2017 AT 1:30. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2017 - JUDGMENT.
